'''sosadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:labellate|labellate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-s-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:labellate|labellate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| sosadhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sosadhithi|sosadhithi]] || [[word:sosadhiji|sosadhiji]] || [[word:sosadhishi|sosadhishi]] || [[word:sosadhiki|sosadhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sosadhuthuthu|sosadhuthuthu]] || [[word:sosadhujuju|sosadhujuju]] || [[word:sosadhushushu|sosadhushushu]] || [[word:sosadhukuku|sosadhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sosadhuthu|sosadhuthu]] || [[word:sosadhuju|sosadhuju]] || [[word:sosadhushu|sosadhushu]] || [[word:sosadhuku|sosadhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sosadhufthuf|sosadhufthuf]] || [[word:sosadhufjuf|sosadhufjuf]] || [[word:sosadhufshuf|sosadhufshuf]] || [[word:sosadhufkuf|sosadhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sosadhethe|sosadhethe]] || [[word:sosadheje|sosadheje]] || [[word:sosadheshe|sosadheshe]] || [[word:sosadheke|sosadheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sosadhothotho|sosadhothotho]] || [[word:sosadhojojo|sosadhojojo]] || [[word:sosadhoshosho|sosadhoshosho]] || [[word:sosadhokoko|sosadhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sosadhotho|sosadhotho]] || [[word:sosadhojo|sosadhojo]] || [[word:sosadhosho|sosadhosho]] || [[word:sosadhoko|sosadhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sosadhofthof|sosadhofthof]] || [[word:sosadhofjof|sosadhofjof]] || [[word:sosadhofshof|sosadhofshof]] || [[word:sosadhofkof|sosadhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:sosadhĂŻfthĂŻf|sosadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:sosadhĂŻfjĂŻf|sosadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:sosadhĂŻfshĂŻf|sosadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:sosadhĂŻfkĂŻf|sosadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:sosadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|sosadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:sosadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|sosadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:sosadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|sosadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:sosadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|sosadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:sosadhĂŻfthĂŻf|sosadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:sosadhĂŻfjĂŻf|sosadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:sosadhĂŻfshĂŻf|sosadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:sosadhĂŻfkĂŻf|sosadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:sosadhĂŻfthĂŻf|sosadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:sosadhĂŻfjĂŻf|sosadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:sosadhĂŻfshĂŻf|sosadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:sosadhĂŻfkĂŻf|sosadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sosadhĂŠthĂŠ|sosadhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:sosadhĂŠjĂŠ|sosadhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:sosadhĂŠshĂŠ|sosadhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:sosadhĂŠkĂŠ|sosadhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sosadhathatha|sosadhathatha]] || [[word:sosadhajaja|sosadhajaja]] || [[word:sosadhashasha|sosadhashasha]] || [[word:sosadhakaka|sosadhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sosadhatha|sosadhatha]] || [[word:sosadhaja|sosadhaja]] || [[word:sosadhasha|sosadhasha]] || [[word:sosadhaka|sosadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sosadhafthaf|sosadhafthaf]] || [[word:sosadhafjaf|sosadhafjaf]] || [[word:sosadhafshaf|sosadhafshaf]] || [[word:sosadhafkaf|sosadhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:sosadhasha|sosadhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:sosadhshĂ«sha|sosadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sosadhrosha|sosadhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sosadhmusha|sosadhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:sosadhyasha|sosadhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gososadhnkshĂ«sha|gososadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gososadhnkrosha|gososadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gososadhnkmusha|gososadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gososadhnkyasha|gososadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:sosasadhasha|sosasadhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sosasadhshĂ«sha|sosasadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sosasadhrosha|sosasadhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sosasadhmusha|sosasadhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sosasadhyasha|sosasadhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gososasadhnkshĂ«sha|gososasadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gososasadhnkrosha|gososasadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gososasadhnkmusha|gososasadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gososasadhnkyasha|gososasadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:sesĂŠdhasha|sesĂŠdhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sesĂŠdhshĂ«sha|sesĂŠdhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sesĂŠdhrosha|sesĂŠdhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sesĂŠdhmusha|sesĂŠdhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sesĂŠdhyasha|sesĂŠdhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosesĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha|gosesĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosesĂŠdhnkrosha|gosesĂŠdhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosesĂŠdhnkmusha|gosesĂŠdhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosesĂŠdhnkyasha|gosesĂŠdhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:sosfadhasha|sosfadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sosfadhshĂ«sha|sosfadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sosfadhrosha|sosfadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sosfadhmusha|sosfadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sosfadhyasha|sosfadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gososfadhnkshĂ«sha|gososfadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gososfadhnkrosha|gososfadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gososfadhnkmusha|gososfadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gososfadhnkyasha|gososfadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
